title: The Shinji Appreciation Society
wikitext:
[]: The Shinji Appreciation Society             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sat Sep 08, 2007 11:40 am Well, err, I just want to say that I love Shinji! He's awesome and people that hate on him are mean! Are you with me? My favorite Evangelion character is actually Shinji! I know I'm pretty much alone in that, but still, Shinji is great!

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Sep 08, 2007 11:46 am CitizenGeek wrote: <snip> My favorite Evangelion character is actually Shinji! I know I'm pretty much alone in that, but still, Shinji is great!

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sat Sep 08, 2007 12:18 pm Shit, my favorite ANIME CHARACTER is Shinji. Arguably my favorite fictional character in general, as well. Welcome.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sat Sep 08, 2007 5:18 pm I think Shinji is underrated, myself.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 08, 2007 7:03 pm Hal is correct in what he said; Shinji IS my favorite Evangelion character. New people, welcome!

[]:             Quote Post by Zeon » Sat Sep 08, 2007 7:11 pm Misato is my favorite, but I have no problem with Shinji. I sympathized a lot with him when I first watched Eva many years ago (when I was closer to his age) but not so much lately. I don't hate him though. I also really like Kaji, Touji, and Rei... Actually, the only character I really dislike is Asuka...

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Sat Sep 08, 2007 7:19 pm Zeon wrote: Actually, the only character I really dislike is Asuka...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Sep 08, 2007 7:19 pm Shinji is my favorite. Gendo second. Asuka third. The character I like least is Misato. I always start out liking her, but by the time she and Kaji get back together I start disliking her, and by EoE I pretty much hate her. :?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Sep 08, 2007 10:03 pm With the characters such as the Three Children (Shinji, Asuka, Rei), I like all three of them, though Shinji is my favorite and I like Shinji/Asuka pairing-wise the best over any other Shinji/whoever pairing. Hating Misato, eh? How come? The only characters I really "hate", and that's only because they seem portrayed as meant to be hated, are Gendo and Ritsuko. At least Misato cares about the pilots, albeit it seems to be just to make herself look good. Ritsuko seems just plain cold-hearted, while Gendo is of course, the Bastard King. Actually, I take that back. SEELE are downright evil bastards with their batshit insane cult of wanting to kill everybody; I hate THEM the most.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Sep 09, 2007 7:46 am Oh wow - you guys all like Shinji? This is now officially my favorite forum EVER! I guess I'm surprised because so many people bash Shinji on other forums (mainly because he's not some stereotypical, Hollywood action hero who saves the day with a smile on his face, and then use's some tacky one-liner to end the movie). You guys are awesome! I thought SEELE were very cool - just the way they conversed with each other and stuff was very interesting! The only Eva character I disliked was Gendo, because he was a total, complete bastard

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Sep 09, 2007 8:09 am I think some of us here dislike Shinji (Tines) but for the most part, we all like him.

[]:             Quote Post by Incisivis » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:18 am *big marquee with flashing letters* I LIKE Shinji I thought I was alone, too, weird. But I hate manga-Shinji so much...

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Sep 09, 2007 11:33 am Incisivis wrote: I LIKE Shinji I thought I was alone, too, weird. But I hate manga-Shinji so much...

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 09, 2007 12:22 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: I think some of us here dislike Shinji (Tines).

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Sep 09, 2007 12:27 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Trigger's Elysium wrote: I think some of us here dislike Shinji (Tines).

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Sep 09, 2007 1:24 pm I can imagine Shinji becoming some sort of artist- a writer/poet or a composer, more specifically. He'd probably create existentially terrifying, Kafka-esque visions of technology gone horribly wrong. Not that that would be a bad thing.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Sep 09, 2007 1:43 pm chee wrote: I can imagine Shinji becoming some sort of artist- a writer/poet or a composer, more specifically. He'd probably create existentially terrifying, Kafka-esque visions of technology gone horribly wrong. Not that that would be a bad thing.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Sep 09, 2007 1:46 pm DatDude wrote: I see him joining an animation studio and making anime . . .

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Sep 09, 2007 1:59 pm chee wrote: DatDude wrote: I see him joining an animation studio and making anime . . .

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Sep 09, 2007 2:03 pm Shinji is great as a character, but I'm not quite sure I'd want to have him as a friend. Same with Asuka and the rest, I guess. And to anyone who hates Shinji, you basically hate Anno. That's why I've always found Tiffany Grant's standpoint so hilarious. She loves Eva, but hates Shinji. XD
summary:
[]: The Shinji Appreciation Society             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sat Sep 08, 2007 11:40 am Well, err, I just want to say that I love Shinji! He's awesome and people that hate on him are mean! Are you with me? My favorite Evangelion character is actually Shinji! I know I'm pretty much alone in that, but still, Shinji is great!

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burto
